headline: Intern Accidentally Emails 'I Hate This Job' To The Whole Company, Gets Promoted
summary: The CEO admired his 'honesty and direct communication style.' The intern is horrified.
fullBody: Kevin McOops meant to text his friend 'I hate this job.' He emailed the entire company. 'Oops,' Kevin said. The CEO responded: 'Finally, someone honest.' Kevin was promoted to 'Director of Brutal Honesty.' His new job: telling people what everyone is thinking. Kevin has now accidentally emailed 'I love this job' to his friends. He's being considered for a raise.
